descriptions.text: Castlevania - Eternity of Sorrow is a full-game romhack and a sequel to the bad ending of Dawn of Sorrow. Created by WetBandAid(feels), this mod features a new story, modified tilesets, new magic seals(very hard but optional), and a new castle. Some areas of the game have been altered more more than others.
After the events of the original game's bad ending, Soma fights through the afterlife to return to the world of the living
